name: BIOHAVEN PHARMAC.HLDG CO.
summary: Biohaven Pharmaceutical Holding Company Ltd. is a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing innovative therapies for neurological diseases, including migraine and other headache disorders. The company's portfolio includes Nurtec ODT (rimegepant) for acute treatment of migraine and a pipeline of other compounds targeting various neurological conditions. Biohaven is headquartered in New Haven, Connecticut.
